zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Hulse於1383年出生在英國爾達文哈姆時，她的父親Hugh Hulse22歲，母親Margery de Domville17歲。她於從大約1418年到1420年與Sir Richard de Vernon結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年4月21日之前在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Hulse于1383年出生在英国爾達文哈姆时，她的父亲Hugh Hulse22岁，母亲Margery de Domville17岁。她于从大约1418年到1420年与Sir Richard de Vernon结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年4月21日之前在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hulse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from Hulse in Witton (Cheshire), from Middle English holes, plural of hole ‘hole, hollow, depression’ (Old English holh). See Hole .
North German (Hülse): topographic name for someone who lived where holly grew, Middle Low German huls, hüls.
American shortened and altered form of Flemish Holsaert (see Hulsart ). Compare Hulce , Huls , and Hults 1.

variants.name: Hulsart
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Holsaert: unexplained. See also Hulse 3.

variants.name: Hole
meanings: English (southwestern): topographic name for someone who lived in or by a hole or hollow, from Middle English hol(e) (Old English hol, holh, dative hole), or a habitational name from some minor place so named.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads, so named from the dative singular or indefinite plural form of Old Norse hóll ‘round hill, mound’.

In some cases possibly also an American shortened form of Flemish Van Hole: habitational name from the common placename Hol(e), meaning ‘hollow, valley’; or a topographic name from the same term or from Middle Dutch hole, heule ‘(low) arched bridge, weir’.

variants.name: Hults
meanings: Altered form of   Hulse  , a surname of Flemish (and also of English and German) origin. Compare   Hultz   1.
In some cases also a variant of   Hultz   2, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Hulce
meanings: Altered form of   Hulse  , a surname of Flemish (and also of English and German) origin.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Hulse was born in 1383, in Davenham, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh Hulse, was 22 and her mother, Margery de Domville, was 17. She married Sir Richard de Vernon from about 1418 to 1420. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 21 April 1474, in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Hulse est née en 1383, à Davenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Hulse, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery de Domville, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de Vernon du environ 1418 au 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 21 avril 1474, à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Hulse 1383 in Davenham, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Hulse 22 und ihre Mutter Margery de Domville 17. Sie hat von um 1418 bis 1420 Sir Richard de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 21. April 1474 in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Hulse è nata il nel 1383 nel Davenham, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Hulse, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margery de Domville, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard de Vernon da circa 1418 a 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 21 aprile 1474, nel Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Hulseが1383年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンハムで生まれた時，父Hugh Hulseは22歳，母Margery de Domvilleは17歳であった。から約1418年まで1420年にSir Richard de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年4月21日以前にイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Hulse(이)가 1383년 영국 체실르 대븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Hulse(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Domville(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1418년 부터 1420년 까지 Sir Richard de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 4월 21일 이전 영국 체실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Hulse nasceu em 1383, em Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Hulse, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Domville, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard de Vernon de aproximadamente 1418 a 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 21 de abril de 1474, em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Hulse родилась в 1383 г. в местности давенам, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Hulse было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Domville, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de Vernon с около 1418 по 1420. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 21 апрель 1474 г. в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Hulse nació en 1383, en Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Hulse, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery de Domville, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir Richard de Vernon desde aproximadamente 1418 hasta 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 21 de abril de 1474, en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
